zh.Kedleston, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾凱德萊斯頓
zh.Croxall, Derbyshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾可洛薩爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix d'Aufay於大約1080年出生在英國德比夏爾凱德萊斯頓時，她的父親Gilbert "le Jeune" d'Auffay50歲，母親Beatrix de Valenciennes48歲。她於大約1125年與Robert de Curzon在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1160年在英國享年82歲。

zh-hans.Kedleston, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾凱德萊斯頓
zh-hans.Croxall, Derbyshire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰德比夏爾可洛薩爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix d'Aufay于大约1080年出生在英国德比夏爾凱德萊斯頓时，她的父亲Gilbert "le Jeune" d'Auffay50岁，母亲Beatrix de Valenciennes48岁。她于大约1125年与Robert de Curzon在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1160年在英国享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix d'Aufay was born about 1080, in Kedleston, Derbyshire, England, her father, Gilbert "le Jeune" d'Auffay, was 50 and her mother, Beatrix de Valenciennes, was 48. She married Robert de Curzon about 1125, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1160, in England, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix d'Aufay est née environ 1080, à Kedleston, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert "le Jeune" d'Auffay, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Beatrix de Valenciennes, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Curzon environ 1125, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1160, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix d'Aufay um 1080 in Kedleston, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilbert "le Jeune" d'Auffay 50 und ihre Mutter Beatrix de Valenciennes 48. Sie hat um 1125 in England Robert de Curzon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1160 im Alter von 82 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix d'Aufay è nata il circa 1080 nel Kedleston, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Gilbert "le Jeune" d'Auffay, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Beatrix de Valenciennes, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Curzon circa 1125, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1160, nel England, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix d'Aufayが約1080年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアケドレストンで生まれた時，父Gilbert "le Jeune" d'Auffayは50歳，母Beatrix de Valenciennesは48歳であった。約1125年にイギリスでRobert de Curzonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1160年にイギリスで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix d'Aufay(이)가 대략 1080년 영국 더비실르 케들레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert "le Jeune" d'Auffay(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix de Valenciennes(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 대략 1125년 영국에서 Robert de Curzon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1160년 영국에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix d'Aufay nasceu aproximadamente 1080, em Kedleston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert "le Jeune" d'Auffay, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix de Valenciennes, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Curzon aproximadamente 1125, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1160, em Inglaterra, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix d'Aufay родилась около 1080 г. в местности кедлестон, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Gilbert "le Jeune" d'Auffay было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix de Valenciennes, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Curzon около 1125 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1160 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 82 лет.

sm.about 1080–about 1160: e tusa o le 1080–e tusa o le 1160

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrix d'Aufay nació aproximadamente 1080, en Kedleston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Gilbert "le Jeune" d'Auffay, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Beatrix de Valenciennes, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Robert de Curzon aproximadamente 1125, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1160, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 82 años.
